back_translation: A big tree is present. The tree has no leaves. The tree has many branches. Clouds are in the sky. A green plant is under the tree.
target_caption: Le sakpakalo'obo' ti'  yano'ob tu k'ab le che'o', le cheo' ya'ab u yich.

predicted_caption: Juntúul péepen yaan yóok'ol le k'abo'. Le péepeno' táan u je'lel. Le péepeno' yaan u boonil chak. Ya'ab ya'ab che'o'ob yaan ichil le k'áaxo'. Ya'ab ya'ax le'o'ob yaan yóok'ol le che'o'.
back_translation: A butterfly is on the branch. The butterfly is resting. The butterfly has a red color. Many trees are in the forest. Green leaves are on the tree.
target_caption: Le boox péepen ti' yaan tu k'ab le che'o'.

predicted_caption: Juntúul sak t'eel yaan yóok'ol le lu'umo'. Le t'eelo' wa'akbal. Juntúul boox kaax yaan tu tséel le t'eelo'. Ya'ab ya'ab che'o'ob yaan ichil le solaro'. Junp'éel nojoch si' yaan yóok'ol le lu'umo'.
back_translation: A white rooster is on the ground. The rooster is standing. A black chicken is next to the rooster. Many trees are in the garden. A big piece of firewood is on the ground.
target_caption: Juntúul sak kaax yéetel juntúul book kaax ti ya'ano'ob yaanal le che'o'.

predicted_caption: Junkúul che' yaan u loolo'ob sakchak. Le che'o' yaan tu tséel le bejo'. Le che'o' Junkúul chan che'. Junp'éel ya'ax su'uk yaan yóok'ol le lu'umo'. Junp'éel ya'ax ka'an yaan.
back_translation: A tree has pink flowers. The tree is next to the road. The tree is a small tree. Green grass is on the ground. The sky is blue.
target_caption: Junkúul sakchak lool yaan yookol le bejo'.

predicted_caption: Junp'éel pak'il yaan tu tséel Junp'éel sak naj. Junp'éel pak'il yaan u boon nojoch. Juntúul ch'uup yaan ichil Junp'éel boon. Ya'ab che'o'ob yaan tu paach Junp'éel naj. Junp'éel bej yaan tu táan Junp'éel naj.
back_translation: A wall is next to a white house. A wall has a big drawing. A woman is in a drawing. Trees are behind a house. A road is in front of a house.
target_caption: Te boona' ya'an juntúul ch'uup ku yiik biix u taabal le k'áako'.
